title: postapiauthregisterwithvaliddata
description: Test user registration endpoint POST /api/auth/register with valid name, email, and password to ensure it returns 201 Created with a new user id.

title: postapiauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Test user login endpoint POST /api/auth/login with registered email and correct password to verify it returns 200 OK with a valid JWT token.

title: postapiauthaadhaarsendotpwithvalidaadhaarnumber
description: Test POST /api/auth/aadhaar/send-otp with a valid Aadhaar number to confirm it returns 200 OK indicating OTP was sent (OTP logged to server console in demo).

title: postapiauthaadhaarverifyotpwithcorrectotp
description: Test POST /api/auth/aadhaar/verify-otp with correct Aadhaar number and OTP to verify it returns 200 OK with a JWT token linking/verifying Aadhaar.

title: postapiauthregisterwithexistingemail
description: Test POST /api/auth/register with an email that already exists to ensure it returns 409 Conflict with an appropriate error message.

title: postapiauthloginwithincorrectpassword
description: Test POST /api/auth/login with valid email but incorrect password to confirm it returns 401 Unauthorized with authentication error.

title: postapiauthaadhaarverifyotpwithincorrectotp
description: Test POST /api/auth/aadhaar/verify-otp with incorrect OTP to verify it returns 400 Bad Request indicating OTP verification failure.

title: getapiauthprofilewithvalidtoken
description: Test GET /api/auth/profile with valid Authorization Bearer token to ensure it returns 200 OK with user profile and vault metadata.
